name: Gingerbread Baked in a Jar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking soda, baking powder, salt, ginger, cinnamon and cloves. Stir in margarine, water and molasses until well blended.
2. Pour batter into pan or divide equally among the 5 jars.
PAN METHOD:
3. Bake at 350°F for 30-40 minutes or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean. Do not over-bake. Cool slightly on a wire rack. Serve warm with lemon sauce.
JAR METHOD:
4. Bake at 325°F for 30-35 minutes or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
